core_mechanism: a wave-kinetic (weak-turbulence) closure in which resonant three-wave interactions among weakly nonlinear modes are averaged into a closed set of kinetic equations for the spectral densities of the conserved quantities, whose stationary power-law solutions describe a scale-to-scale cascade
brief_reason: The abstract derives a weak turbulence formalism where three-wave interactions lead to kinetic equations for the spectral densities of energy and helicity, with exactly computed power-law spectral solutions.
